name: @autoszap/desktop
description: Desktop shell do AutoZap com Electron
author: AutoZap

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --watch --external electron --external electron-updater" "wait-on dist-electron/main.js tcp:5173 && electron ."
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k "tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --watch --external electron --external electron-updater" "wait-on dist-electron/main.js tcp:3000 && cross-env DESKTOP_WEB_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron ."
scripts.build: vite build && tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --external electron --external electron-updater
